name: Conditional Required (if/then)
summary: Conditionally required fields using JSON Schema if/then/else — essential when using SHOW/HIDE rules
whenToUse: Making fields required only when a controlling field has a certain value
Preventing validation errors on hidden fields that use SHOW/HIDE rules
Dynamic required logic like 'if hasChildren is true, then childsName is required'
notes: CRITICAL: Always pair SHOW/HIDE rules with conditional validation in the data schema
Without if/then, hidden required fields cause form validation to fail silently
The `if/then` construct is at the top level of the data schema (same level as `properties` and `required`)
Add `minLength: 1` to conditionally required string fields for the empty-string workaround
There can only be one `if/then` at each schema level — use `allOf` for multiple conditions
